semen.name: Tajimax
semen.headline: SCD AA-6, Carrier Free, 2200+ lbs, Frame Score 9, at least 62.5% Tajima!
semen.description: The largest full-blood Wagyu we have seen anywhere, and may be the largest-framed high-Tajima (62.5%+) bull in the world outside Japan. Discovered by accident as a 2000+ lb 'stunted' embryo calf named Kemono. Tajimax calves stand out from day one in frame and height and mature into the biggest, thickest steers in the feedlot, with no reported calving-ease issues. Full story on his animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: At least 62.5% (10/16) Tajima; dam GAW Sanshiga ~80% Tajima, 1500 lb flusher.
attributes.weight_note: 2200+ lbs; tipped 2220 lbs 'greyhound skinny' off cows at 4 yrs; est. 2800 lbs+ if kept on feed.

semen.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Dependabull, Munnsville, NY; Interglobe Genetics, Pontiac, IL; Darley Stud, Aberdeen, NSW, AUS; Sexing Technologies, Navasota, TX

photos.alt: Tajimax
Tajimax (FB16684), full-body at four years of age on cows
photos.subject: the bull himself

photos.alt: Tajimax at four years old, 2200+ lbs at turnout
photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: UKB Mr Itokitasuru
semen.headline: SCD AA-3, F-11 Carrier. The world's only living Westholme 007 line bull outside Westholme and AAACO in Australia!
semen.description: Triple line-bred the 'Hyogo Cow' Kitatsuru. Kitatsurukiku Doi (FB6387) is the registered name of Westholme 007, and Mr Itokitasuru is the only living, registered direct descendant of that original import bull, a 3/4 full brother to the world's #1 marbling bull Fukutsuru 068. His dam is linebred Fukutsuru 068, making him basically triple linebred the 'magic cross.' Uber-fertile: filled a 2000-straw order in one week. 'Gus' has a cult following of central-Texas F1 buyers.

attributes.strain_notes: Westholme 007 (Kitatsurukiku Doi FB6387) line; triple-linebred Fukutsuru 068 / Kitatsuru 'Hyogo Cow'. Chisahime 662 and Yasutanisakura 931 influence.

pricing.label: Heifer Sexed Domestic US 4 mill AI/Flush
CSS Exportable Heifer Sexed 4 mill AI/Flush

semen.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Champion Genetics, Canton, TX; Total Livestock Genetics, Camperdown, VIC, AUS

photos.alt: UKB Mr Itokitasuru (FB13957)
photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: WR Tottori Special E124
semen.headline: SCD-AA, Carrier Free. A carrier-free Mazda son — Australia hasn't had a Mazda son/daughter hit the ground in two decades.
semen.description: Carrier-free son of one of the rarest Wagyu sires in the world, Mazda, and a flushmate to AI sire Ichiro. E124's dam CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 is out of Suzutaka 2 (full sister to Shikikan). Loaded with old-school Eikou Tottori frame, thickness and maternals; a proven, carrier-free extreme outcross package.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda = pure Youhou-line Tottori. Maternal Itozuru Doi 151 + Suzutani (Suzutaka 2) blood.
attributes.weight_note: Dam's sister Suzito 3 sold $52,000 (2018 Synergy Wagyu SALE).

semen.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Dependabull, Munnsville, NY; Total Livestock Genetics, Camperdown, VIC, AUS

semen.name: Kikuyasu 10X
semen.headline: SCD AA-4, Carrier Free. High-Tajima son of Kikuyasu 400, the largest 100% Tajima full-blood bull ever exported from Japan (~1,980 lbs).
semen.description: Came out of nowhere as the highest frame/growth weanling of a 7-head embryo group — the other 6 were Shigefuku J1822 sons, and this high-Tajima Kikuyasu 400 son outgrew all the Kedakas. His dam the J84 cow is Will Neal's prized donor, picked from 200+ heifers out of Ultimate Kobe Beef's 2009 crop. Being worldwide CSS collected at Interglobe.

attributes.strain_notes: High Tajima (100% Doi-blood Tajima sire). JVP + UKB program powerhouse.
attributes.weight_note: Sire Kikuyasu 400 = largest 100% Tajima full-blood ever exported at 1,980 lbs.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: Tsunami 51B
semen.headline: Itomichi 1/2 x Kenhanafuji over 'Suzutani' — a Shimane x Nami marbling cocktail.
semen.description: Combines the two greatest Shimane-line import bulls (Itomichi 1/2 and Kenhanafuji) with the undisputed greatest cow of the breed, Suzutani. 2nd dam 'Heatherkura' by Haruki II is a full sister to the immortal Shigeshigetani. Highest-growth yearling of a 15+ bull peer group; both Tsunamis sent to EU & CSS quarantine.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Nami.
attributes.weight_note: 1700+ lb two-year-old still being collected at Interglobe.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: Tsunami 54B
semen.headline: Flushmate-quality Shimane x Nami firepower, twin to Tsunami 51B.
semen.description: Same Itomichi 1/2 x Kobe Mizutani 607E masterpiece cross as Tsunami 51B; both looked so good WagyuRanch couldn't decide which to keep and sent both to EU & CSS quarantine. Dam Mizutani 607E pictured in catalog as dam of 51B, 52B and 54B.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Nami.
attributes.weight_note: 1700+ lb two-year-old still being collected at Interglobe.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: Itozakahana 52B
semen.headline: Itomichi 1/2 x Mizukura 17W — paternal half-brother to 3-time Denver Grand Champion Sweet Willie.
semen.description: Sired by the Shimane powerhouse growth bull Itomichi 1/2. His dam Mizukura 17W is a top Takazakura daughter of Six Buck Ranch's donor Kobe Mizutani (herself by Kenhanafuji and a full sister of Shigeshigetani). Explosive growth, milk and marbling without reducing eye appeal.

attributes.strain_notes: Takazakura (grandson of Yasufuku 930) + Kenhanafuji + full sister to Shigeshigetani, amplified by Itomichi 1/2 growth.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B
semen.headline: Sired by the only Westholme 006 son in North America (Dai 6 Kitaseki) with rare Youhou-line Tottori outcross.
semen.description: Combines the potent outcross of Westholme 006 and Youhou blood with the greatest Tajima cow Suzutani and the best of Fujiyoshi in Kenhanafuji (Itohana's best marbling son). Youhou-line Tottori carries no 'Kedaka' bull in its pedigree. A real shot of heterosis while still line-breeding Suzutani, Haruki II/Monjiro and Itohana.

attributes.strain_notes: Westholme 006 + Youhou-line Tottori outcross over Suzutani/Kenhanafuji.

related_photos.alt: UKB Dai 6 Kitaseki, sire of Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B
related_photos.subject: UKB Dai 6 Kitaseki, sire of Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: Hanasolo 64C
semen.headline: Rare grandson of Sanjiro 3, the new #1 marbling sire all-time.
semen.description: A combination of the best of Shimane and Tajima blood. Dam linebred Suzutani; sire LMR Toshiro is by original import Kikuhana (largest Wagyu ever exported at 2700+ lbs) over original import cow Reiko, a daughter of 2-time Zenkyo winner Kitaguni 7/8. Grandson of Sanjiro 3, a full brother to Sanjirou that out-marbled Fukutsuru 068.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Tajima; Sanjiro 3, Suzutani, Kenhanafuji, Kikuhana/Reiko.
attributes.weight_note: Sire Toshiro ~1900 lb mainstay at Lone Mountain.

semen.name: CHR Kikutsuru Doi 624A
semen.headline: Uber-rare son of TF Kikutsuru Doi 146, the only line-bred Yasutani Doi bull outside Japan.
semen.description: 624's sire is 50% genetically identical to the great Yasufuku J930 but with poor motility (progeny only via IVF), so as of 2019 there were only 8 full-blood bulls sired by 146 in the herdbook. With Kitaguni Jr, Michifuku and Fukutsuru 068 on the bottom, a marbling powerhouse carrying rare 146 blood in a carrier-free package.

attributes.strain_notes: TF Kikutsuru Doi 146 (line-bred Yasutani Doi) blood; ~8 FB bulls by 146 in herdbook as of 2019.

photos.alt: CHR Kikutsuru Doi 624A (FB17077)
photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: WR Tottori Nashi E113
semen.headline: SCD AA-9, Carrier Free. A carrier-free Mazda son out of the phenomenal Nanashi cow.
semen.description: Carrier-free AA-9 direct son of Mazda and Nanashi. Dam Nanashi is the most phenotypically impressive cow WagyuRanch has seen, an AA-8 daughter of the GOAT Itozuru Doi 151 with Sanjirou and Kitaguni Jr as 2nd and 3rd sires, 1700+ lbs open in pasture, kept in a special paddock at TransOva HQ so visitors could see her.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda (Youhou-line Tottori) x Itozuru Doi 151 daughter.
attributes.weight_note: Dam Nanashi 1700+ lbs open in pasture.

related_photos.alt: Nanashi, dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113
related_photos.subject: Nanashi, dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113

semen.name: WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33
semen.headline: SCD AA-4, F-11 Carrier. Two rare original imports — Shigefuku 005 and JVP Yasutanisakura 931 — within 2 generations.
semen.description: Sire Shigefuku J1822 (Dai 20 Hirashige son, half-brother to industry-changing Hirashigekatsu); dam UKB JVP Chisahime 208 out of triple-carrier JVP Yasutanisakura 931 and original import Chisahime 662. The only linbred Yasukane animal in the herdbook. A dose of Shigefuku, 931 and Chisahime 662 in one shot.

attributes.strain_notes: 100% Kedaka/Tottori sire (Shigefuku 005 line) + JVP Yasutanisakura 931 + Chisahime 662.

related_photos.alt: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33
related_photos.subject: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33

semen.name: WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36
semen.headline: SCD AA-3, Carrier Free. Carrier-free 100% JVP pedigree: Kikuyasu 400 over Yasutanisakura 931.
semen.description: Spectacular 100% JVP pedigree — a direct son of JVP Kikuyasu 400 (largest 100% Tajima ever exported, ~2000 lbs) over the top side of triple-carrier JVP Yasutanisakura 931 and original import F-11 carrier JVP Chisahime 662. Odds of a carrier-free bull with both as grandparents are 1 in 16 — and he came up carrier free.

attributes.strain_notes: 100% JVP; high Tajima (Kikuyasu 400) + Yasutanisakura 931 + Chisahime 662.

related_photos.alt: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36
related_photos.subject: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36

semen.name: WR Mazda Back In Black E125 ET
semen.headline: CHS Carrier. A >75% Tottori bull at less than $1500 per straw — highest-content Tottori AWA bull walking the planet outside Japan.
semen.description: At least 37.5% Tottori (highest-content Tottori AWA-registered bull outside Japan). Dam Kohana is a linebred Mazda daughter (Mazda x Akako). A great way to inject immediate heterosis into any herd — few breeders have ever seen a full-blood with Mazda anywhere in its pedigree.

attributes.strain_notes: Linebred Mazda (Youhou-line Tottori); at least 37.5% Tottori.

semen.name: WR Mazda Tanisa Hime E121
semen.headline: F11 Carrier. Two of the rarest bulls in Wagyu — Mazda and Yasutanisakura 931 — in one package.
semen.description: Dam UKB JVP Chisahime 208 is the only linebred Yasukane cow in the AWA herdbook, sired by Yasutani Doi (sire of Yasufuku J930). With Mazda a carrier and 931 a triple carrier, only a 1-in-32 chance of a single-carrier bull. Injects immediate heterosis from two extremely rare, chart-topping sires at once.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda (Tottori) x Yasutanisakura 931 / Chisahime 662.

semen.name: Umezuru Doi 58B
semen.headline: Carrier-Free Umemaru x Nanashi son — Akaushi growth/milk/grass-marbling meets extreme black Tajima/Shimane marbling.
semen.description: Result of breeding the only line-bred Dai 10 Mitsumaru son 'Umemaru' (WSI Umemaru, Akaushi) to one of the largest-framed high-Tajima black cows outside Japan, Nanashi. Registered black. Nanashi is an AA-8, >60% Tajima Itozuru Doi 151 daughter, 1542 lbs. An Akaushi sire line bred to the greatest Akaushi bull, over a record-setting high-Tajima black dam.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi sire (WSI Umemaru, line-bred Dai 10 Mitsumaru) over black high-Tajima Nanashi; registered as black (100.00% B).
attributes.weight_note: Dam Nanashi 1542 lbs.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

semen.name: ESF Barr Sanjirou 4P 042-147
semen.headline: One of the most powerful high-Tajima (70%) bulls in the country. F-11 carrier herd sire.
semen.description: A WagyuRanch herd bull for 3 years. ~70% Tajima with a nearly 100% Tajima sire (Bar R Sanjirou 4P) and frame/dimension from a star-studded bottom (Takazakura, Kikuyasu 400, Kedaka import cow JVP Yuriko-1 050). 1667 lbs in running shape on cows, 1900+ over winter. Phenomenal F1 producer.

attributes.strain_notes: ~70% Tajima; Sanjirou/068/Takazakura/Kikuyasu 400/Yuriko Kedaka.
attributes.weight_note: 1667 lbs on cows; 1900+ lbs over winter.

semen.name: Kenhanafuji
semen.headline: Original import — for more than two decades the highest-selling Wagyu ever sold. 'The International Bull of Mystery.' Carrier Free.
semen.description: One of the very few zero-Tajima original imports (~75% Fujiyoshi/Shimane, ~25% Kedaka). Only calf out of the great Hanafuji cow ever registered outside Japan; sire Itohana led Japan in marbling two years in a row. Bought by Eiji Funatsuki for $150,000 cash after arriving in the US and largely kept out of circulation. Limited quantity by private treaty; 50M+ cell count per straw. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: ~75% Fujiyoshi / ~25% Kedaka, ZERO Tajima.

pricing.label: Current market pricing — call or text 801-259-9358

photos.alt: Kenhanafuji

semen.name: CF Rueshaw 26W
semen.headline: High-selling Akaushi bull of the 2018 Steaks Are High Texas Wagyu Sale — a big-time outcross bull.
semen.description: One of the most impressive Rueshaw sons; a direct son of Rueshaw (the only national champion to ever leave Japan) with a heart-stopping meat-wagon phenotype. 75% of his genetics come from Rueshaw, Judo and Homare — none of which were part of the Al & Marie Woods shipment — making him a BIG-TIME outcross bull for the Akaushi breed. Maternal grand dam JVP MS Homare J 30E is considered the most powerful cow in the Akaushi breed.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi outcross; 75% from Rueshaw/Judo/Homare (outside the Woods shipment).

related_photos.alt: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of CF Rueshaw 26W
related_photos.subject: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of CF Rueshaw 26W

photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: WCC Chubby Buddy
semen.headline: 2014 Houston Senior Champion Bull — largest ribeye and lowest backfat of the show; perhaps the largest-framed Akaushi in the AWA.
semen.description: Came off 7000+ acres of open west Utah range as an 1100+ lb yearling; won Senior Champion at 2014 Houston (Marble Score 7.71, REA 17.25 in, backfat 0.13 in). Sale-record high seller at the 2014 Texas Wagyu sale. Bred an Angus cow at under 7 months of age. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; extreme frame. Dai 10 Mitsumaru/Big Al/Akiko blood.
attributes.frame: extreme (largest-framed Akaushi in AWA per WagyuRanch)
attributes.weight_note: 2000-2400+ lbs at turnout.

photos.alt: WCC Chubby Buddy at 17 months of age winning Senior Champion Bull at Houston
photos.subject: the bull himself (show photo with handlers)

semen.name: SOR Big Al
semen.headline: Perhaps the LONGEST Akaushi bull in the breed — 2200+ lbs. 'Big Al 2.0' with higher marbling.
semen.description: High-selling bull (black or red) at the 2017 Texas Wagyu Sale; an eye-popping 1-ton phenotype at 4 yrs. Sire HB Big Al 502 (mature ~1750 lbs); grand dam J 30E cow widely considered the greatest Akaushi female of the AWA. Judo (best marbling of original red sires) on the bottom via Hikari — a phenotypic improvement over the original Big Al with more growth and added marbling.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; Big Al x J 30E; 'Big Al 2.0.'
attributes.weight_note: 2200+ lbs; 1-ton phenotype at 4 yrs.

related_photos.alt: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of SOR Big Al
related_photos.subject: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of SOR Big Al

photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: JC Rueshaw 90
semen.headline: Carrier-free phenotypic standout from the cross that produced 3-time Houston Grand Champion Rueshaw 75.
semen.description: A '90' bull from the star cross behind 3-time Houston Grand Champion 'Rueshaw 75' and feedlot magician 'Rueshaw II' (sold $100,000 to a syndicate). Pedigree features two of the rarest Akaushi cow families, Kaedemaru and Kunisakae 124. Dam JC MS Umemaru 30 also produced JC 92, 79, 75 and 74 — a uniformly powerful seedstock set.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; Kunisakae + Kaedemaru rare cow families; carrier free.

semen.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Champion Genetics, Canton, TX; Total Livestock Genetics, Camperdown, VIC, AUS

photos.alt: JC Rueshaw 90 (FB16181)
photos.subject: the bull himself

semen.name: HB Big Al 502
semen.headline: Original import — the first full-blood Akaushi born outside Japan. Sire of Ashwood, #1 for growth in Australia EBVs.
semen.description: The direct product of the best bull (Dai 10 Mitsumaru) and cow (Akiko) of the Akaushi breed. Akiko was bred to Dai 10 Mitsumaru before quarantine in Japan; Big Al was carried across the Pacific en utero and born in the US. A HeartBrand mainstay herd sire. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi original import; Dai 10 Mitsumaru x Akiko.

embryo.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × Itomoritaka J2703
embryo.headline: Yasufuku Jr maternal grand sire (only import sire by Yasufuku); Westholme 002 (milk/growth) on top. Emphasis on milk.

embryo.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × Kenhanafuji
embryo.headline: Highest-selling bull of all time over a Yasufuku II donor; Kikuyasu 400, Yasufuku Jr and Monjiro stacked. Marbling mama-cow deluxe.

embryo.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: Line-bred Kikuyasu 400 (largest 100% Tajima exported, ~2000 lbs); grand sire of 3x Denver champ Sweet Willie. One-ton Tajimas.

embryo.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Shigefuku (one of only 2 pure Kedaka to leave Japan; half-brother to Hirashigekatsu). Dai 20 Hirashige son over Shimane x Tajima dam.

embryo.name: ESF Fukutsuru 068-42-68 × Itomoritaka J2703
embryo.headline: 1300+ lb '068' donor with Kedaka import cow 'Yuriko' on the bottom; high Kedaka x Shimane + greatest marbling sire 068.

embryo.name: ESF Fukutsuru 068-42-68 × Kenhanafuji
embryo.headline: Kenhanafuji over a 068 daughter — best of Shimane and Tajima marbling.

embryo.name: Mizukura 17W × JVP Hiratafuji 402
embryo.headline: 'Kobe Mizutani' daughter (by Kenhanafuji x Heatherkura). Hiratafuji 'The Lost Bull', triple line-bred Dai 7 Itozakura. *EU EXPORT ELIGIBLE.

embryo.name: Mizukura 17W × Kenhanafuji
embryo.headline: Some of the world's first line-bred Kenhanafujis (Kenhanafuji over a Kobe Mizutani/Kenhanafuji daughter).

embryo.name: Mizukura 17W × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Best in Kedaka + Shimane + Tajima on a Takazakura daughter.

embryo.name: Mizukura 17W × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: Kikuyasu 400 over a Tak daughter — stout frame, thickness and marbling.

embryo.name: Nanashi × JVP Hiratafuji 402
embryo.headline: Nanashi (deepest/thickest cow breeders had seen at TransOva) x rare Hiratafuji. Itozuru Doi, Sanjiro, Kitaguni Jr up close. *EU EXPORT ELIGIBLE.

embryo.name: Nanashi × Kenhanafuji
embryo.headline: Nanashi x highest-selling bull of all time — breed-changing sires and donors.

embryo.name: Nanashi × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Nanashi x the only 100% Kedaka sire we ever got. Join the tiny group owning a 60% Kedaka outside Japan.

embryo.name: Nanashi × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: 80%+ uber-high-Tajima calves with unreal growth for the Tajima level.

embryo.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E × Red Emperor
embryo.headline: 30E Homare daughter (rare JVP Homare akaushi line outside the Woods shipment). Red Emperor's dam = Dai 8 Marunami, the prefectural gem.

embryo.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E × Tamamaru
embryo.headline: Tamamaru = another Dai 8 Marunami son, highest growth of the original import bulls (per HeartBrand).

embryo.name: Kohana × Kenhanafuji
embryo.headline: Kenhanafuji over a Mazda daughter — 50% of Kohana's blood from the only pure Youhou-strain Tottori to leave Japan. Extreme outcross.

embryo.name: Mutsuko × Mazda
embryo.headline: Mazda (only pure Youhou-line Tottori) with Takazakura 101L; Kikuhana top and bottom; Yasutani Doi and Fujiko tucked in.

embryo.name: Mutsuko × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: The only 100% Kedaka bull (half-brother to Hirashigekatsu) over an elite high-growth Shimane x Tajima dam.

embryo.name: Meihisha × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Kedaka x Shimane daughter of 'Meihi' (068 x Fujiko's full sister). Best of growth and marbling.

embryo.name: Meihi × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: 068 x Fujiko's full sister; offspring carry Shigefuku, Dai 20 Hirashige, 068 and Fujiko.

embryo.name: Meihi × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: 80%+ Tajima calves; stacked Doi on Nami (Fujiko) with a dash of Shimane.

embryo.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Full sister to Stonyrun ID 151 Ichiro 1 (FBB11842). Shigefuku, Dai 20 Hirashige, Itozuru Doi 151, Takazakara, Suzutani in one pedigree.

embryo.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 326 × Shigefuku J1822
embryo.headline: Flushmate full sister to 325 / sister to Ichiro. Same dream Shigefuku pedigree.

embryo.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: Pure Doi-blood sire over a composite dam by the greatest composite sire, out of Suzutaka 2 (daughter of Suzutani).

embryo.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 326 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
embryo.headline: Sister to 325 x Kikuyasu 400. Marked SOLD OUT on the vintage page.

herd_bull.name: ESF Barr Sanjirou 4P 042-147
herd_bull.headline: One of the most powerful high-Tajima (~70%) bulls in the country.
herd_bull.description: A WagyuRanch herd bull for 3 years. ~70% Tajima with a nearly 100% Tajima sire (Bar R Sanjirou 4P) and frame/dimension from a star-studded bottom side: Yasufuku 930 grandson Takazakura, Kikuyasu 400 (largest pure Tajima ever exported, ~1900 lbs) and the great Kedaka import cow JVP Yuriko-1 050. Weighed 1667 lbs on pasture working 40+ cows the week of the herd-bull video; frame and depth to break 1900 lbs bunker-fed. A phenomenal F1 producer of thick, fast-growing steers. F-11 carrier.

attributes.weight_note: 1667 lbs on cows; 1900+ lbs bunker-fed.

donor.name: Mizukura 17W
donor.description: A long, thick 'Kobe Mizutani' daughter and top Takazakura daughter. Dam Kobe Mizutani 607E is herself by Kenhanafuji and a full sister to Shigeshigetani. Foundation donor of WagyuRanch's high-marbling program.

donor.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0
donor.description: Deep-chested, super-typy donor sired by the phenotype standout 'BR Itomichi 0602' (a top Itomichi 1/2 son). Maternal grand sire Yasufuku Jr — the only Japanese import sire we have descending from the legendary Yasufuku. Balance of growth, milk and marbling with a milk lean.

donor.name: ESF Fukutsuru 068-42-68
donor.description: An above-average-sized 1300+ lb '068'-sired donor with the fabled Kedaka import cow 'Yuriko' on the bottom. High Kedaka x Shimane combined with the greatest marbling sire of all time (Fukutsuru 068, $6M+ in semen sales). Balance of high-end marbling, maternals and growth.

donor.name: WCC Delicious
donor.description: Akaushi donor stacked with Dai 10 Mitsumaru / Big Al / Dai 8 Marunami blood. Sire Sumo Cattle Co Seisakushu C221 over Coates E208 (a Big Al 502 daughter).

donor.name: Coates E208
donor.description: Akaushi donor; a Big Al 502 daughter out of Twa Musume (Dai 8 Marunami line). Appears as the dam of WCC Delicious.

scan_data.attribution_note: Houston scan block on donors.html appears adjacent to this animal; attribution to Coates E208 is probable but not certain.

donor.name: Nanashi
donor.description: Described by breeders at TransOva as the deepest-chested, thickest, longest Wagyu cow they had ever seen — kept in her own paddock by the office. A >60% Tajima cow that looks nothing like a high Tajima, sired by arguably the greatest composite bull of all time (Itozuru Doi 151) with Sanjirou and Kitaguni Jr as 2nd/3rd sires. AA-8; ~1542 lbs. Dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113 and Umezuru Doi 58B.

photos.alt: Nanashi (FB10054), donor dam pictured in the 2019 catalog
photos.subject: the donor herself

donor.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E
donor.description: 2014 Houston Reserve Grand Champion Red Full-blood Heifer. Rare direct daughter of the famous '30E' cow at Ultimate Kobe Beef — 30E being a daughter of original import JVP Homare (one of two Akaushi cows in the JVP shipment, outside the Al & Marie Woods shipment). 62.5% of her genes trace to the four Akaushi (Rueshaw, Judo, Homare, Kunisakae) outside the Woods shipment, making her a prized outcross donor.

all.name: Tajimax
all.headline: SCD AA-6, Carrier Free, 2200+ lbs, Frame Score 9, at least 62.5% Tajima!
all.description: The largest full-blood Wagyu we have seen anywhere, and may be the largest-framed high-Tajima (62.5%+) bull in the world outside Japan. Discovered by accident as a 2000+ lb 'stunted' embryo calf named Kemono. Tajimax calves stand out from day one in frame and height and mature into the biggest, thickest steers in the feedlot, with no reported calving-ease issues. Full story on his animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: At least 62.5% (10/16) Tajima; dam GAW Sanshiga ~80% Tajima, 1500 lb flusher.
attributes.weight_note: 2200+ lbs; tipped 2220 lbs 'greyhound skinny' off cows at 4 yrs; est. 2800 lbs+ if kept on feed.

all.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Dependabull, Munnsville, NY; Interglobe Genetics, Pontiac, IL; Darley Stud, Aberdeen, NSW, AUS; Sexing Technologies, Navasota, TX

Tajimax (FB16684), full-body at four years of age on cows

photos.alt: Tajimax at four years old, 2200+ lbs at turnout

all.name: UKB Mr Itokitasuru
all.headline: SCD AA-3, F-11 Carrier. The world's only living Westholme 007 line bull outside Westholme and AAACO in Australia!
all.description: Triple line-bred the 'Hyogo Cow' Kitatsuru. Kitatsurukiku Doi (FB6387) is the registered name of Westholme 007, and Mr Itokitasuru is the only living, registered direct descendant of that original import bull, a 3/4 full brother to the world's #1 marbling bull Fukutsuru 068. His dam is linebred Fukutsuru 068, making him basically triple linebred the 'magic cross.' Uber-fertile: filled a 2000-straw order in one week. 'Gus' has a cult following of central-Texas F1 buyers.

attributes.strain_notes: Westholme 007 (Kitatsurukiku Doi FB6387) line; triple-linebred Fukutsuru 068 / Kitatsuru 'Hyogo Cow'. Chisahime 662 and Yasutanisakura 931 influence.

pricing.label: Heifer Sexed Domestic US 4 mill AI/Flush
CSS Exportable Heifer Sexed 4 mill AI/Flush

all.name: WR Tottori Special E124
all.headline: SCD-AA, Carrier Free. A carrier-free Mazda son — Australia hasn't had a Mazda son/daughter hit the ground in two decades.
all.description: Carrier-free son of one of the rarest Wagyu sires in the world, Mazda, and a flushmate to AI sire Ichiro. E124's dam CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 is out of Suzutaka 2 (full sister to Shikikan). Loaded with old-school Eikou Tottori frame, thickness and maternals; a proven, carrier-free extreme outcross package.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda = pure Youhou-line Tottori. Maternal Itozuru Doi 151 + Suzutani (Suzutaka 2) blood.
attributes.weight_note: Dam's sister Suzito 3 sold $52,000 (2018 Synergy Wagyu SALE).

all.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Dependabull, Munnsville, NY; Total Livestock Genetics, Camperdown, VIC, AUS

all.name: Kikuyasu 10X
all.headline: SCD AA-4, Carrier Free. High-Tajima son of Kikuyasu 400, the largest 100% Tajima full-blood bull ever exported from Japan (~1,980 lbs).
all.description: Came out of nowhere as the highest frame/growth weanling of a 7-head embryo group — the other 6 were Shigefuku J1822 sons, and this high-Tajima Kikuyasu 400 son outgrew all the Kedakas. His dam the J84 cow is Will Neal's prized donor, picked from 200+ heifers out of Ultimate Kobe Beef's 2009 crop. Being worldwide CSS collected at Interglobe.

attributes.strain_notes: High Tajima (100% Doi-blood Tajima sire). JVP + UKB program powerhouse.
attributes.weight_note: Sire Kikuyasu 400 = largest 100% Tajima full-blood ever exported at 1,980 lbs.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: Tsunami 51B
all.headline: Itomichi 1/2 x Kenhanafuji over 'Suzutani' — a Shimane x Nami marbling cocktail.
all.description: Combines the two greatest Shimane-line import bulls (Itomichi 1/2 and Kenhanafuji) with the undisputed greatest cow of the breed, Suzutani. 2nd dam 'Heatherkura' by Haruki II is a full sister to the immortal Shigeshigetani. Highest-growth yearling of a 15+ bull peer group; both Tsunamis sent to EU & CSS quarantine.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Nami.
attributes.weight_note: 1700+ lb two-year-old still being collected at Interglobe.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: Tsunami 54B
all.headline: Flushmate-quality Shimane x Nami firepower, twin to Tsunami 51B.
all.description: Same Itomichi 1/2 x Kobe Mizutani 607E masterpiece cross as Tsunami 51B; both looked so good WagyuRanch couldn't decide which to keep and sent both to EU & CSS quarantine. Dam Mizutani 607E pictured in catalog as dam of 51B, 52B and 54B.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Nami.
attributes.weight_note: 1700+ lb two-year-old still being collected at Interglobe.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: Itozakahana 52B
all.headline: Itomichi 1/2 x Mizukura 17W — paternal half-brother to 3-time Denver Grand Champion Sweet Willie.
all.description: Sired by the Shimane powerhouse growth bull Itomichi 1/2. His dam Mizukura 17W is a top Takazakura daughter of Six Buck Ranch's donor Kobe Mizutani (herself by Kenhanafuji and a full sister of Shigeshigetani). Explosive growth, milk and marbling without reducing eye appeal.

attributes.strain_notes: Takazakura (grandson of Yasufuku 930) + Kenhanafuji + full sister to Shigeshigetani, amplified by Itomichi 1/2 growth.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B
all.headline: Sired by the only Westholme 006 son in North America (Dai 6 Kitaseki) with rare Youhou-line Tottori outcross.
all.description: Combines the potent outcross of Westholme 006 and Youhou blood with the greatest Tajima cow Suzutani and the best of Fujiyoshi in Kenhanafuji (Itohana's best marbling son). Youhou-line Tottori carries no 'Kedaka' bull in its pedigree. A real shot of heterosis while still line-breeding Suzutani, Haruki II/Monjiro and Itohana.

attributes.strain_notes: Westholme 006 + Youhou-line Tottori outcross over Suzutani/Kenhanafuji.

related_photos.alt: UKB Dai 6 Kitaseki, sire of Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B
related_photos.subject: UKB Dai 6 Kitaseki, sire of Dai 6 Seizanatani 53B

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: Hanasolo 64C
all.headline: Rare grandson of Sanjiro 3, the new #1 marbling sire all-time.
all.description: A combination of the best of Shimane and Tajima blood. Dam linebred Suzutani; sire LMR Toshiro is by original import Kikuhana (largest Wagyu ever exported at 2700+ lbs) over original import cow Reiko, a daughter of 2-time Zenkyo winner Kitaguni 7/8. Grandson of Sanjiro 3, a full brother to Sanjirou that out-marbled Fukutsuru 068.

attributes.strain_notes: Shimane x Tajima; Sanjiro 3, Suzutani, Kenhanafuji, Kikuhana/Reiko.
attributes.weight_note: Sire Toshiro ~1900 lb mainstay at Lone Mountain.

all.name: CHR Kikutsuru Doi 624A
all.headline: Uber-rare son of TF Kikutsuru Doi 146, the only line-bred Yasutani Doi bull outside Japan.
all.description: 624's sire is 50% genetically identical to the great Yasufuku J930 but with poor motility (progeny only via IVF), so as of 2019 there were only 8 full-blood bulls sired by 146 in the herdbook. With Kitaguni Jr, Michifuku and Fukutsuru 068 on the bottom, a marbling powerhouse carrying rare 146 blood in a carrier-free package.

attributes.strain_notes: TF Kikutsuru Doi 146 (line-bred Yasutani Doi) blood; ~8 FB bulls by 146 in herdbook as of 2019.

photos.alt: CHR Kikutsuru Doi 624A (FB17077)
photos.subject: the bull himself

all.name: WR Tottori Nashi E113
all.headline: SCD AA-9, Carrier Free. A carrier-free Mazda son out of the phenomenal Nanashi cow.
all.description: Carrier-free AA-9 direct son of Mazda and Nanashi. Dam Nanashi is the most phenotypically impressive cow WagyuRanch has seen, an AA-8 daughter of the GOAT Itozuru Doi 151 with Sanjirou and Kitaguni Jr as 2nd and 3rd sires, 1700+ lbs open in pasture, kept in a special paddock at TransOva HQ so visitors could see her.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda (Youhou-line Tottori) x Itozuru Doi 151 daughter.
attributes.weight_note: Dam Nanashi 1700+ lbs open in pasture.

related_photos.alt: Nanashi, dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113
related_photos.subject: Nanashi, dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113

all.name: WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33
all.headline: SCD AA-4, F-11 Carrier. Two rare original imports — Shigefuku 005 and JVP Yasutanisakura 931 — within 2 generations.
all.description: Sire Shigefuku J1822 (Dai 20 Hirashige son, half-brother to industry-changing Hirashigekatsu); dam UKB JVP Chisahime 208 out of triple-carrier JVP Yasutanisakura 931 and original import Chisahime 662. The only linbred Yasukane animal in the herdbook. A dose of Shigefuku, 931 and Chisahime 662 in one shot.

attributes.strain_notes: 100% Kedaka/Tottori sire (Shigefuku 005 line) + JVP Yasutanisakura 931 + Chisahime 662.

related_photos.alt: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33
related_photos.subject: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Shige Tanisa Hime D33

all.name: WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36
all.headline: SCD AA-3, Carrier Free. Carrier-free 100% JVP pedigree: Kikuyasu 400 over Yasutanisakura 931.
all.description: Spectacular 100% JVP pedigree — a direct son of JVP Kikuyasu 400 (largest 100% Tajima ever exported, ~2000 lbs) over the top side of triple-carrier JVP Yasutanisakura 931 and original import F-11 carrier JVP Chisahime 662. Odds of a carrier-free bull with both as grandparents are 1 in 16 — and he came up carrier free.

attributes.strain_notes: 100% JVP; high Tajima (Kikuyasu 400) + Yasutanisakura 931 + Chisahime 662.

related_photos.alt: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36
related_photos.subject: UKB JVP Chisahime 208, dam of WR Kiku Tanisa Hime D36

all.name: WR Mazda Back In Black E125 ET
all.headline: CHS Carrier. A >75% Tottori bull at less than $1500 per straw — highest-content Tottori AWA bull walking the planet outside Japan.
all.description: At least 37.5% Tottori (highest-content Tottori AWA-registered bull outside Japan). Dam Kohana is a linebred Mazda daughter (Mazda x Akako). A great way to inject immediate heterosis into any herd — few breeders have ever seen a full-blood with Mazda anywhere in its pedigree.

attributes.strain_notes: Linebred Mazda (Youhou-line Tottori); at least 37.5% Tottori.

all.name: WR Mazda Tanisa Hime E121
all.headline: F11 Carrier. Two of the rarest bulls in Wagyu — Mazda and Yasutanisakura 931 — in one package.
all.description: Dam UKB JVP Chisahime 208 is the only linebred Yasukane cow in the AWA herdbook, sired by Yasutani Doi (sire of Yasufuku J930). With Mazda a carrier and 931 a triple carrier, only a 1-in-32 chance of a single-carrier bull. Injects immediate heterosis from two extremely rare, chart-topping sires at once.

attributes.strain_notes: Mazda (Tottori) x Yasutanisakura 931 / Chisahime 662.

all.name: Umezuru Doi 58B
all.headline: Carrier-Free Umemaru x Nanashi son — Akaushi growth/milk/grass-marbling meets extreme black Tajima/Shimane marbling.
all.description: Result of breeding the only line-bred Dai 10 Mitsumaru son 'Umemaru' (WSI Umemaru, Akaushi) to one of the largest-framed high-Tajima black cows outside Japan, Nanashi. Registered black. Nanashi is an AA-8, >60% Tajima Itozuru Doi 151 daughter, 1542 lbs. An Akaushi sire line bred to the greatest Akaushi bull, over a record-setting high-Tajima black dam.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi sire (WSI Umemaru, line-bred Dai 10 Mitsumaru) over black high-Tajima Nanashi; registered as black (100.00% B).
attributes.weight_note: Dam Nanashi 1542 lbs.

pricing.label: CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 2.5 mill AI
CSS Sexed Worldwide Exportable 5.0 mill Flush/IVF

all.name: ESF Barr Sanjirou 4P 042-147
all.headline: One of the most powerful high-Tajima (70%) bulls in the country. F-11 carrier herd sire.
all.description: A WagyuRanch herd bull for 3 years. ~70% Tajima with a nearly 100% Tajima sire (Bar R Sanjirou 4P) and frame/dimension from a star-studded bottom (Takazakura, Kikuyasu 400, Kedaka import cow JVP Yuriko-1 050). 1667 lbs in running shape on cows, 1900+ over winter. Phenomenal F1 producer.

attributes.strain_notes: ~70% Tajima; Sanjirou/068/Takazakura/Kikuyasu 400/Yuriko Kedaka.
attributes.weight_note: 1667 lbs on cows; 1900+ lbs over winter.

all.name: Kenhanafuji
all.headline: Original import — for more than two decades the highest-selling Wagyu ever sold. 'The International Bull of Mystery.' Carrier Free.
all.description: One of the very few zero-Tajima original imports (~75% Fujiyoshi/Shimane, ~25% Kedaka). Only calf out of the great Hanafuji cow ever registered outside Japan; sire Itohana led Japan in marbling two years in a row. Bought by Eiji Funatsuki for $150,000 cash after arriving in the US and largely kept out of circulation. Limited quantity by private treaty; 50M+ cell count per straw. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: ~75% Fujiyoshi / ~25% Kedaka, ZERO Tajima.

pricing.label: Current market pricing — call or text 801-259-9358

photos.alt: Kenhanafuji

all.name: CF Rueshaw 26W
all.headline: High-selling Akaushi bull of the 2018 Steaks Are High Texas Wagyu Sale — a big-time outcross bull.
all.description: One of the most impressive Rueshaw sons; a direct son of Rueshaw (the only national champion to ever leave Japan) with a heart-stopping meat-wagon phenotype. 75% of his genetics come from Rueshaw, Judo and Homare — none of which were part of the Al & Marie Woods shipment — making him a BIG-TIME outcross bull for the Akaushi breed. Maternal grand dam JVP MS Homare J 30E is considered the most powerful cow in the Akaushi breed.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi outcross; 75% from Rueshaw/Judo/Homare (outside the Woods shipment).

related_photos.alt: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of CF Rueshaw 26W
related_photos.subject: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of CF Rueshaw 26W

all.name: WCC Chubby Buddy
all.headline: 2014 Houston Senior Champion Bull — largest ribeye and lowest backfat of the show; perhaps the largest-framed Akaushi in the AWA.
all.description: Came off 7000+ acres of open west Utah range as an 1100+ lb yearling; won Senior Champion at 2014 Houston (Marble Score 7.71, REA 17.25 in, backfat 0.13 in). Sale-record high seller at the 2014 Texas Wagyu sale. Bred an Angus cow at under 7 months of age. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; extreme frame. Dai 10 Mitsumaru/Big Al/Akiko blood.
attributes.frame: extreme (largest-framed Akaushi in AWA per WagyuRanch)
attributes.weight_note: 2000-2400+ lbs at turnout.

photos.alt: WCC Chubby Buddy at 17 months of age winning Senior Champion Bull at Houston
photos.subject: the bull himself (show photo with handlers)

all.name: SOR Big Al
all.headline: Perhaps the LONGEST Akaushi bull in the breed — 2200+ lbs. 'Big Al 2.0' with higher marbling.
all.description: High-selling bull (black or red) at the 2017 Texas Wagyu Sale; an eye-popping 1-ton phenotype at 4 yrs. Sire HB Big Al 502 (mature ~1750 lbs); grand dam J 30E cow widely considered the greatest Akaushi female of the AWA. Judo (best marbling of original red sires) on the bottom via Hikari — a phenotypic improvement over the original Big Al with more growth and added marbling.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; Big Al x J 30E; 'Big Al 2.0.'
attributes.weight_note: 2200+ lbs; 1-ton phenotype at 4 yrs.

related_photos.alt: JVP MS Homare J 30E, maternal grand dam of SOR Big Al

all.name: JC Rueshaw 90
all.headline: Carrier-free phenotypic standout from the cross that produced 3-time Houston Grand Champion Rueshaw 75.
all.description: A '90' bull from the star cross behind 3-time Houston Grand Champion 'Rueshaw 75' and feedlot magician 'Rueshaw II' (sold $100,000 to a syndicate). Pedigree features two of the rarest Akaushi cow families, Kaedemaru and Kunisakae 124. Dam JC MS Umemaru 30 also produced JC 92, 79, 75 and 74 — a uniformly powerful seedstock set.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi; Kunisakae + Kaedemaru rare cow families; carrier free.

all.semen_location: Hawkeye Breeders, Adel, IA; Champion Genetics, Canton, TX; Total Livestock Genetics, Camperdown, VIC, AUS

all.name: HB Big Al 502
all.headline: Original import — the first full-blood Akaushi born outside Japan. Sire of Ashwood, #1 for growth in Australia EBVs.
all.description: The direct product of the best bull (Dai 10 Mitsumaru) and cow (Akiko) of the Akaushi breed. Akiko was bred to Dai 10 Mitsumaru before quarantine in Japan; Big Al was carried across the Pacific en utero and born in the US. A HeartBrand mainstay herd sire. See full animal page.

attributes.strain_notes: Akaushi original import; Dai 10 Mitsumaru x Akiko.

all.headline: Yasufuku Jr maternal grand sire (only import sire by Yasufuku); Westholme 002 (milk/growth) on top. Emphasis on milk.

all.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × Kenhanafuji
all.headline: Highest-selling bull of all time over a Yasufuku II donor; Kikuyasu 400, Yasufuku Jr and Monjiro stacked. Marbling mama-cow deluxe.

all.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
all.headline: Line-bred Kikuyasu 400 (largest 100% Tajima exported, ~2000 lbs); grand sire of 3x Denver champ Sweet Willie. One-ton Tajimas.

all.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0 × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Shigefuku (one of only 2 pure Kedaka to leave Japan; half-brother to Hirashigekatsu). Dai 20 Hirashige son over Shimane x Tajima dam.

all.headline: 'Kobe Mizutani' daughter (by Kenhanafuji x Heatherkura). Hiratafuji 'The Lost Bull', triple line-bred Dai 7 Itozakura. *EU EXPORT ELIGIBLE.

all.name: Mizukura 17W × Kenhanafuji
all.headline: Some of the world's first line-bred Kenhanafujis (Kenhanafuji over a Kobe Mizutani/Kenhanafuji daughter).

all.name: Mizukura 17W × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Best in Kedaka + Shimane + Tajima on a Takazakura daughter.

all.name: Mizukura 17W × JVP Kikuyasu-400

all.name: Nanashi × JVP Hiratafuji 402
all.headline: Nanashi (deepest/thickest cow breeders had seen at TransOva) x rare Hiratafuji. Itozuru Doi, Sanjiro, Kitaguni Jr up close. *EU EXPORT ELIGIBLE.

all.name: Nanashi × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Nanashi x the only 100% Kedaka sire we ever got. Join the tiny group owning a 60% Kedaka outside Japan.

all.name: Nanashi × JVP Kikuyasu-400
all.headline: 80%+ uber-high-Tajima calves with unreal growth for the Tajima level.

all.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E × Red Emperor
all.headline: 30E Homare daughter (rare JVP Homare akaushi line outside the Woods shipment). Red Emperor's dam = Dai 8 Marunami, the prefectural gem.

all.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E × Tamamaru
all.headline: Tamamaru = another Dai 8 Marunami son, highest growth of the original import bulls (per HeartBrand).

all.name: Kohana × Kenhanafuji
all.headline: Kenhanafuji over a Mazda daughter — 50% of Kohana's blood from the only pure Youhou-strain Tottori to leave Japan. Extreme outcross.

all.name: Mutsuko × Mazda
all.headline: Mazda (only pure Youhou-line Tottori) with Takazakura 101L; Kikuhana top and bottom; Yasutani Doi and Fujiko tucked in.

all.name: Mutsuko × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: The only 100% Kedaka bull (half-brother to Hirashigekatsu) over an elite high-growth Shimane x Tajima dam.

all.name: Meihisha × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Kedaka x Shimane daughter of 'Meihi' (068 x Fujiko's full sister). Best of growth and marbling.

all.name: Meihi × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: 068 x Fujiko's full sister; offspring carry Shigefuku, Dai 20 Hirashige, 068 and Fujiko.

all.name: Meihi × JVP Kikuyasu-400
all.headline: 80%+ Tajima calves; stacked Doi on Nami (Fujiko) with a dash of Shimane.

all.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Full sister to Stonyrun ID 151 Ichiro 1 (FBB11842). Shigefuku, Dai 20 Hirashige, Itozuru Doi 151, Takazakara, Suzutani in one pedigree.

all.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 326 × Shigefuku J1822
all.headline: Flushmate full sister to 325 / sister to Ichiro. Same dream Shigefuku pedigree.

all.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 325 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
all.headline: Pure Doi-blood sire over a composite dam by the greatest composite sire, out of Suzutaka 2 (daughter of Suzutani).

all.name: CHR MS Itozuru Doi 326 × JVP Kikuyasu-400
all.headline: Sister to 325 x Kikuyasu 400. Marked SOLD OUT on the vintage page.

all.name: ESF Barr Sanjirou 4P 042-147
all.headline: One of the most powerful high-Tajima (~70%) bulls in the country.
all.description: A WagyuRanch herd bull for 3 years. ~70% Tajima with a nearly 100% Tajima sire (Bar R Sanjirou 4P) and frame/dimension from a star-studded bottom side: Yasufuku 930 grandson Takazakura, Kikuyasu 400 (largest pure Tajima ever exported, ~1900 lbs) and the great Kedaka import cow JVP Yuriko-1 050. Weighed 1667 lbs on pasture working 40+ cows the week of the herd-bull video; frame and depth to break 1900 lbs bunker-fed. A phenomenal F1 producer of thick, fast-growing steers. F-11 carrier.

attributes.weight_note: 1667 lbs on cows; 1900+ lbs bunker-fed.

all.name: Mizukura 17W
all.description: A long, thick 'Kobe Mizutani' daughter and top Takazakura daughter. Dam Kobe Mizutani 607E is herself by Kenhanafuji and a full sister to Shigeshigetani. Foundation donor of WagyuRanch's high-marbling program.

all.name: ESF Yasufuku II N 0624 0
all.description: Deep-chested, super-typy donor sired by the phenotype standout 'BR Itomichi 0602' (a top Itomichi 1/2 son). Maternal grand sire Yasufuku Jr — the only Japanese import sire we have descending from the legendary Yasufuku. Balance of growth, milk and marbling with a milk lean.

all.name: ESF Fukutsuru 068-42-68
all.description: An above-average-sized 1300+ lb '068'-sired donor with the fabled Kedaka import cow 'Yuriko' on the bottom. High Kedaka x Shimane combined with the greatest marbling sire of all time (Fukutsuru 068, $6M+ in semen sales). Balance of high-end marbling, maternals and growth.

all.name: WCC Delicious
all.description: Akaushi donor stacked with Dai 10 Mitsumaru / Big Al / Dai 8 Marunami blood. Sire Sumo Cattle Co Seisakushu C221 over Coates E208 (a Big Al 502 daughter).

all.name: Coates E208
all.description: Akaushi donor; a Big Al 502 daughter out of Twa Musume (Dai 8 Marunami line). Appears as the dam of WCC Delicious.

scan_data.attribution_note: Houston scan block on donors.html appears adjacent to this animal; attribution to Coates E208 is probable but not certain.

all.name: Nanashi
all.description: Described by breeders at TransOva as the deepest-chested, thickest, longest Wagyu cow they had ever seen — kept in her own paddock by the office. A >60% Tajima cow that looks nothing like a high Tajima, sired by arguably the greatest composite bull of all time (Itozuru Doi 151) with Sanjirou and Kitaguni Jr as 2nd/3rd sires. AA-8; ~1542 lbs. Dam of WR Tottori Nashi E113 and Umezuru Doi 58B.

photos.alt: Nanashi (FB10054), donor dam pictured in the 2019 catalog
photos.subject: the donor herself

all.name: UKB MS Homare Shige M30E
all.description: 2014 Houston Reserve Grand Champion Red Full-blood Heifer. Rare direct daughter of the famous '30E' cow at Ultimate Kobe Beef — 30E being a daughter of original import JVP Homare (one of two Akaushi cows in the JVP shipment, outside the Al & Marie Woods shipment). 62.5% of her genes trace to the four Akaushi (Rueshaw, Judo, Homare, Kunisakae) outside the Woods shipment, making her a prized outcross donor.

all.name: Cattle for Sale
all.headline: Fullblood & F1 bulls, heifers, cows, steers and feeders
